overall.description: A cinematic exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the interior of a futuristic luxury vehicle before exiting into a neon-lit underground parking garage. The camera moves through the cyan-illuminated concrete space, approaching a central red-lit tree installation before an Arasaka armored vehicle drives past.

agents.ego_description: slowly moving through the car interior from the rear seats toward the front dashboard, examining the leather upholstery and neon accents

entered.detail: white leather bucket seats with diamond stitching pattern
futuristic control panel with illuminated buttons and screens
cyan neon light strips running along the car roof interior
sleek dashboard with integrated displays and ambient lighting
futuristic rectangular steering wheel with metallic accents

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the interior of a futuristic luxury vehicle, moving forward from the rear seats past the center console toward the dashboard. Cyan neon lights illuminate the white leather interior as the camera approaches the steering wheel and front controls.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with cyan neon ceiling strips

events.description: exits the vehicle interior into the expansive concrete parking garage

agents.ego_description: circling the parked vehicle and walking through the garage, passing concrete pillars and observing the neon-lit architecture

entered.detail: sleek black vehicle with glowing cyan accents and reflective surfaces
large cylindrical support columns with black and white banding
cyan rectangular neon light fixtures mounted on the garage ceiling
smooth concrete pavement with red painted parking lines
distant cars parked along the garage perimeter
artificial tree with red illuminated foliage in a central planter

segments.scene_description: Having exited the vehicle, the camera circles the sleek black car with its glowing cyan accents before proceeding through the underground parking garage. The environment features massive concrete pillars and striking cyan neon ceiling strips that cast an ethereal glow on the concrete floor as the camera approaches a distant red-lit tree installation.

scene_state.functional_zone: central atrium with illuminated tree installation

events.description: Arasaka armored vehicle drives past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching the central red-lit tree installation and observing the passing armored vehicle

notable_agents.action: Arasaka armored vehicle with headlights on driving through the parking garage

entered.detail: black armored vehicle with Arasaka branding and red emergency lights
raised rectangular platform housing the illuminated tree

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the striking red-lit artificial tree installation at the center of the garage, passing by its concrete planter. As the camera moves past the tree, an Arasaka armored vehicle enters the frame from the right, driving past with its headlights cutting through the cyan-lit environment before continuing down the parking lane.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, high-tech interior of a luxury vehicle into the expansive, neon-lit atmosphere of an underground parking garage. It begins by gliding forward from the rear seats past a center console toward the dashboard, where cyan neon lights illuminate the white leather upholstery. As the camera exits the vehicle, the perspective circles the sleek black exterior before moving deeper into the garage, passing massive concrete pillars under ethereal cyan ceiling strips. The scene then shifts toward a striking red-lit artificial tree installation at the center of the space, moving past its concrete planter. Finally, as the camera clears the installation, an Arasaka armored vehicle enters the frame from the right, its headlights cutting through the cyan glow as it drives past down the parking lane.
